name: qmcp-core
description: Type-safe declarative graph engine for building surveys and questionnaires

scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format esm --target node && bun build src/question-type.ts --outfile dist/question-type.js --format esm --target node
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --format cjs --target node && bun build src/question-type.ts --outfile dist/question-type.cjs --format cjs --target node
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:types
